_comment: Monster database — tactical tips for combat prompts. Keyed by monster_id.

Jaw Worm.tip: Opens with Chomp, then mixes Bellow (+3 Str, gains Block) and Thrash. Kill fast before Bellow stacks Strength.

Cultist.tip: Uses Incantation turn 1 (+3 Ritual Strength/turn), then attacks every turn. Kill quickly before Strength scaling becomes lethal.

Louse_L.tip: 75% Bite, 25% Grow (+3 Str). Curl Up: gains Block when first hit by an attack. Multi-hit attacks efficiently pop Curl Up.

Louse_S.tip: 75% Bite, 25% Spit Web (Weak). Curl Up: gains Block when first hit. Less dangerous than Red Louse — debuffs instead of scaling.

Blue Slaver.tip: Attacks and applies Weak. Less threatening than Red Slaver; kill the more dangerous enemy first in multi-fights.

Red Slaver.tip: Uses Entangle (prevents Attacks for 1 turn) and applies Vulnerable. Very dangerous — consider killing first in multi-fights.

Acid Slime (L).tip: Corrosive Spit (adds Slimed), Tackle, Lick (Weak). Splits into 2 medium slimes at 50% HP. Burst from above 50% to 0 to minimize split HP.

Acid Slime (M).tip: Smaller version — Corrosive Spit and Lick. Cannot split further.

Acid Slime (S).tip: Weak slime, applies Weak via Lick. Trivial alone but annoying in groups.

Spike Slime (L).tip: Flame Tackle and Lick (Frail). Splits into 2 medium slimes at 50% HP. Burst from above 50% to 0.

Spike Slime (M).tip: Flame Tackle and Lick (Frail). Cannot split.

Spike Slime (S).tip: Weak slime, uses Tackle. Trivial alone.

FungusBeast.tip: 60% Bite, 40% Grow (+Str). On death: Spore Cloud applies 2 Vulnerable. Kill when you can afford to be Vulnerable.

Looter.tip: Steals gold with attacks, then Smoke Bombs and escapes. Kill before it escapes to recover stolen gold.

Mugger.tip: Act 2 Looter — steals gold and escapes. Kill fast to recover gold.

GremlinNob.tip: CRITICAL: Gains 2 Strength every time you play a Skill. Minimize Skill usage — attack-heavy hands are key. Skull Bash applies Vulnerable.

Lagavulin.tip: Sleeps 3 turns with 8 Metallicize. Wakes on HP damage through Block. Pattern: Attack, Attack, Siphon Soul (-1 Str/-1 Dex), repeat. Kill fast or Siphon cripples you.

Sentry.tip: 3 Sentries alternate Bolt (adds 2 Daze to discard) and Beam (attack). Sentries 0/2 start Bolt, Sentry 1 starts Beam. Focus one down to reduce Daze flooding and incoming damage.

TheGuardian.tip: Mode Shift counter decreases by damage dealt; at 0, enters Defensive Mode with Sharp Hide (deals damage per Attack card played). Play fewer, bigger Attacks in Defensive Mode. Roll Attack then Twin Slam in Defensive Mode.

Hexaghost.tip: Turn 1: Activate (nothing). Turn 2: Divider (6 hits × your unblocked HP from turn 1 — Block heavily turn 1!). Then cycles Sear/Tackle/Inflame(+2 Str)/Inferno(6-hit). Race to kill before second Inferno cycle.

SlimeBoss.tip: Pattern: Goop Spray (3 Slimed), Preparing, Slam (35 damage). Splits into 2 large slimes at 50% HP. Burst from above 50% to 0 to skip split.

Chosen.tip: Turn 1: Poke. Turn 2: Hex (adds Dazed to draw pile when you play non-Attacks). Kill fast to minimize Daze; lean on Attacks after Hex.

Byrd.tip: Flight: takes 50% damage until hit 3+ times in one turn. Multi-hit attacks (Sword Boomerang, Dagger Spray) are essential to ground them.

Shelled Parasite.tip: 14 Plated Armor (gains Block/turn). If Plated Armor hits 0, stunned for a turn. Multi-hit attacks strip Plated Armor quickly.

SphericGuardian.tip: Only 20 HP but has Barricade (Block persists) and 3 Artifact. High single-hit damage is best. Poison must burn through Artifact first.

SnakePlant.tip: 65% Chomp, 35% Enfeebling Spores (Weak + Frail). Malleable: gains increasing Block per hit/turn. Use fewer, harder-hitting attacks.

Snecko.tip: Opens with Perplexing Glare (Confused: randomizes card costs 0-3). Then Bite/Tail Whip (Vulnerable). High-cost decks benefit from Confused; Artifact blocks it.

BookOfStabbing.tip: Multi-Stab increases hit count each use. Shuffles Wound on unblocked attack damage. Kill fast before multi-stab scales; Block every turn.

GremlinLeader.tip: Summons Gremlins and Encourages (+Str to all). Kill Gremlin Wizards first (high damage). All minions die when Leader dies.

Taskmaster.tip: Appears with Blue + Red Slaver. Kill Red Slaver first (Entangle), then Blue, then Taskmaster. AoE is very strong.

TheChamp.tip: Phase 1: Attacks + Taunt (Weak/Vuln) every 4 turns. At 50% HP: Anger (+6 Str, removes debuffs) then Execute. Burst from above 50% to kill in 1-2 turns after phase change.

BronzeAutomaton.tip: Spawns Orbs (steal cards via Stasis). Pattern: Flail/Boost/Flail/Boost/Hyper Beam/Stunned. Save burst for Stunned turn (free damage). Kill Orbs to recover stolen cards.

TheCollector.tip: Spawns 2 Torch Heads. Mega Debuff on turn 4 (Vuln+Weak+Frail). Kill Torch Heads to prevent buff stacking, but Collector may re-summon.

Darkling.tip: CRITICAL: Life Link — dead Darklings revive with 50% HP unless ALL are at 0 HP simultaneously. Weaken all three, then kill all in one turn. AoE is essential.

OrbWalker.tip: Laser adds Burn to draw and discard piles. Kill fast before Burns accumulate and clog deck.

SpireGrowth.tip: Constrict deals unavoidable damage at end of your turn, stacking each use. Kill fast before Constrict stacks become lethal.

Transient.tip: 999 HP but dies after ~5 turns (Fading). Attacks escalate +10 Str/turn. Just block and survive — don't waste resources attacking unless you can deal 999.

Nemesis.tip: Alternates Intangible (all damage reduced to 1) and vulnerable turns. Shuffles Burns. Attack only on non-Intangible turns; Block on Intangible turns.

Reptomancer.tip: CRITICAL: Summons Daggers that Explode for massive damage on their 2nd turn. Kill Daggers immediately before they Explode. AoE is critical.

WrithingMass.tip: Reactive: changes intent when hit. Malleable: gains Block per hit/turn. Can use Implant (Parasite curse). Use fewer, bigger attacks.

GiantHead.tip: Slow debuff: Attacks deal 10% less for each card played this turn. Play non-Attacks first, then Attacks. Has countdown to massive hit — kill before it expires.

TheMaw.tip: Opens with Roar (Weak + Frail). Drool gains Strength, then alternates Slam/Nom. Kill quickly before buffed attacks overwhelm.

AwakenedOne.tip: CRITICAL: Phase 1 — Curiosity: gains Strength each time you play a Power. Avoid Powers in Phase 1. At 0 HP, revives full HP in Phase 2 (Curiosity removed). Save Powers for Phase 2.

TimeEater.tip: CRITICAL: After every 12 cards played, ends your turn and gains 2 Str. At 50% HP: Haste heals to 50% and removes debuffs (once). Count cards carefully; burst from above 50% to lethal to skip Haste.

Donu.tip: Alternates Circle of Power (+3 Str to ALL enemies) and Beam. Kill Donu first to stop Strength scaling for both enemies. Starts with 2 Artifact.

Deca.tip: Alternates Beam and Square of Protection (Block). Paired with Donu — kill Donu first unless Deca's Dazes are crippling draws. Starts with 2 Artifact.
